rationale: Fresh handoff consumed accepted feedback build only. Build has accepted status, explicit REQ-UI-ASCII-001..012, approved diff rows D1..D6, non-goals, and open planning questions. Requirements are coherent enough for documentation loop; remaining questions are planning/implementation scope, not feedback ambiguity.

isolation_requirement.reason: Fresh validation is preferred but not required for this profile.

isolation.notes: Repository had pre-existing dirty worktree; feedback validation is artifact-only and does not require clean worktree.
